laptops.query: MacBook with M series processor and at least 24GB RAM

gpu.query: GPU upgrade from GTX 1070, good value

keyboards.query: wireless mechanical keyboard, TKL or 65% or 75% layout (no numpad), tactile or linear switches (not clicky, not blue switches)

cameras.query: Fujifilm X-T4 or X-T3 or X-S10 or X-S20 or Sony A6600, mirrorless camera body or kit, good condition, under R20000
